meaning: Master of Religious Education 宗教教育硕士
examples: The closer they are to me, the mre I like them.
Father Subler has used MRE boxes as a makeshift altar for this Mass in the Badula Qulp area.
His research team is now evaluating the use of MRE in detecting breast cancer and Alzheimer disease.
Moamal just sat silent, opening his mouth like a little sparrow from time to time as a U.S. soldier fed him from an MRE (Meal-Ready-to-Eat) pack.
An MRE with meat, however, was another matter.
